mapper.sql: id, code, model, manufacturer, max_flight_time_minutes, max_range_km, payload_kg, max_altitude_meters, max_speed_kmh, battery_capacity_mah, weight_kg, camera_resolution, has_gps, has_obstacle_avoidance, purchase_date, warranty_expire_date, serial_number, department, application_field, status, remark, created_at, updated_at

where.if: AND ( code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO uav ( code, model, manufacturer, max_flight_time_minutes, max_range_km, payload_kg, max_altitude_meters, max_speed_kmh, battery_capacity_mah, weight_kg, camera_resolution, has_gps, has_obstacle_avoidance, purchase_date, warranty_expire_date, serial_number, department, application_field, status, remark, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{model}, #{manufacturer}, #{maxFlightTimeMinutes}, #{maxRangeKm}, #{payloadKg}, #{maxAltitudeMeters}, #{maxSpeedKmh}, #{batteryCapacityMah}, #{weightKg}, #{cameraResolution}, #{hasGps}, #{hasObstacleAvoidance}, #{purchaseDate}, #{warrantyExpireDate}, #{serialNumber}, #{department}, #{applicationField}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE uav SET code = #{code}, model = #{model}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, max_flight_time_minutes = #{maxFlightTimeMinutes}, max_range_km = #{maxRangeKm}, payload_kg = #{payloadKg}, max_altitude_meters = #{maxAltitudeMeters}, max_speed_kmh = #{maxSpeedKmh}, battery_capacity_mah = #{batteryCapacityMah}, weight_kg = #{weightKg}, camera_resolution = #{cameraResolution}, has_gps = #{hasGps}, has_obstacle_avoidance = #{hasObstacleAvoidance}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, warranty_expire_date = #{warrantyExpireDate}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, department = #{department}, application_field = #{applicationField}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM uav WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM uav WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{id}
